title: paspalum humifusum
intro: Paspalum humifusum, also known as creeping paspalum, is a type of perennial grass native to Australia and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of P. humifusum include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. P. humifusum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are often used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
